title: ibarraea petenensis
intro: Ibarraea petenensis, also known as the Mexican cedar, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ibarraea petenensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves and bark can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and poultices.
